mapper.select: SELECT HEI.PERSON_ID AS PERSON_ID, HEI.START_DATE AS START_DATE, GET_DEPT_NAME(HEI.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPT_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HEI.MAIN_BUSINESS, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS MAIN_BUSINESS, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HEI.POST_GRADE_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_GRADE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HEI.TRANS_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS TRANS_CODE FROM HR_EXPERIENCE_INSIDE HEI WHERE HEI.PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HEI.ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY HEI.START_DATE DESC
